file.content:
name: Rust

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]

env:
  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always

jobs:
  build:
  
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v3
    - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      with:
        components: clippy, rustfmt
    - name: Install packages
      run: sudo apt-get install libllvm18 llvm-18 llvm-18-dev libpolly-18-dev
    - name: Build
      run: cargo build 
    - name: Check formatting
      run: cargo fmt  -- --check
    - name: Clippy
      run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -Dclippy::all -D warnings
    - name: Test
      run: cargo test
    - name: Bench
      run: cargo bench

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV CARGO_TERM_COLOR=always

# Install system dependencies including Rust and LLVM
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    build-essential \
    libllvm18 \
    llvm-18 \
    llvm-18-dev \
    libpolly-18-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust using rustup
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable

# Add cargo to PATH
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Install additional Rust components
RUN rustup component add clippy rustfmt

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and run the test script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV CARGO_TERM_COLOR=always

# Install system dependencies including Rust and LLVM
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    build-essential \
    wget \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Add LLVM repository
RUN curl https://apt.llvm.org/llvm-snapshot.gpg.key | apt-key add - && \
    echo "deb http://apt.llvm.org/jammy/ llvm-toolchain-jammy-18 main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/llvm-18.list && \
    apt-get update

# Install LLVM packages
RUN apt-get install -y \
    libllvm18 \
    llvm-18 \
    llvm-18-dev \
    libpolly-18-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust using rustup
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable

# Add cargo to PATH
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Install additional Rust components
RUN rustup component add clippy rustfmt

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and run the test script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
